properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh listen tour wondrous story Counted once among the lost Yet, one came down from Heaven's glory, Saving us at awful cost.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who saved us from eternal loss? Who but God's son up on the cross What did He do? Where is He now? In heaven interceding.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No angel could our place have taken Highest of the high though he, The loved one on the cross forsaken was One of the God -head Three

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And yet this wondrous tale proceedeth, Stirring heart and tongue a flame As our High Priest in Heaven pleadeth, And Christ Jesus is His name.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Will you surrender to this saviour? To His sceptre humbly bow You, too, shall come to know His favour He will save you, save you now.
